name: Help wanted

## Contribution Area

What area do you want to help with?

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Secret storage design
- [ ] Config/auth safety
- [ ] GUI/tray planning
- [ ] Provider research
- [ ] Packaging/distribution
- [ ] Other

## Proposed Work

Describe the focused task or improvement.

## Issue-First Check

- [ ] This has an existing issue.
- [ ] I am opening this to discuss before implementation.

## Testing Plan

How would you validate the change?

## Safety Check

- [ ] This contribution will not include API keys or private config/auth files.
- [ ] Any examples will use fake values or `REDACTED`.
